best_ambient_tc_onset_conditions: at ambient pressure (0 GPa) on SrLaAlO4 providing ~2.0% compressive epitaxial strain; GAE-grown
best_ambient_tc_zero_conditions: at ambient pressure (0 GPa) on SrLaAlO4 providing ~2.0% compressive epitaxial strain; PLD-grown La3Ni2O7
strengths: Highest frontier Tc across all nickelate sub-families (96 K onset under pressure, 63 K onset ambient films)
Most active demonstrated uplift levers (5): compressive strain, hydrostatic pressure, O-stoichiometry, RE substitution, structural choice
Active lever stacking demonstrated (strain + pressure compounds Tc)
Fastest-moving frontier: from no ambient SC (pre-2024) to 63 K onset in ~18 months
weaknesses: Enormous onset-to-zero-resistance gap (~37-60 K) at ambient in films
GAE growth method limited to few specialized labs
Zero-resistance Tc at ambient (~2-3 K in PLD films) far below 80 K evaluation gate
No known mechanism to retain pressurized Tc at ambient (unlike Hg1223 PQP)
ranking_rationale: Leads on highest frontier Tc (96 K onset), highest ambient onset (63 K), most active levers (5), and fastest frontier improvement rate. The primary weakness is the enormous onset-to-zero gap at ambient.

best_ambient_tc_zero_conditions: at ambient pressure (0 GPa); bulk sample; thermodynamically stable; air-stable
strengths: Truly ambient pressure (0 GPa) and thermodynamically stable
Zero-resistance confirmed (not onset-only): 40 K is reliable
Air-stable: does not degrade under ambient storage
Bulk sample: not a thin-film artifact
weaknesses: Lower absolute Tc than bilayer family (40 K zero-resist vs 63 K onset / 96 K onset under pressure)
Limited uplift levers explored (O-stoichiometry is main known knob)
Ceiling unknown without strain engineering data
ranking_rationale: Backup because it has the highest confirmed ambient zero-resistance Tc (40 K) and thermodynamic stability, but lower absolute ceiling and fewer explored levers than bilayer.

strengths: Confirms Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate series as superconducting family (n=2 and n=3 both superconduct)
Provides context for understanding layer-count vs Tc in the RP series
weaknesses: Highest required operating pressure among three sub-families (69 GPa)
Lowest Tc among three sub-families (30 K onset)
No thin-film strain engineering pathway established
ranking_rationale: Low priority because it has the lowest Tc (30 K onset), requires the highest operating pressure (69 GPa), and has no ambient pathway demonstrated.
